title: Platform FFI Packaging
problem: Platform wrappers exist, but verification entry points are partly PowerShell-only and Apple iOS/macOS packaging needs fresh local evidence on macOS.
gates: python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify-platform-bindings.py scripts/build-python-uniffi-wheel.py platforms/android/build-android.py platforms/flutter/tool/android-smoke.py
cargo nextest run -p merman-uniffi --features bindgen-smoke --test bindgen_smoke
git diff --check -- scripts platforms bindings docs README.md Package.swift

continue_policy.notes: Lane closed after adding Python platform script entry points, updating docs, verifying Apple XCFramework generation on macOS, and passing focused FFI/UniFFI gates. Follow-ons are CI matrix and publication packaging.
